metaTitle: IBS & Digestive Disorders | Piedmont Nutrition Care
metaDescription: Resolve IBS, chronic bloating, and digestive pain through targeted gut microbiome restoration. Medical Nutrition Therapy in Winston-Salem, NC.
headline: Your stomach bloats after every meal. Your doctor can't explain why. Your gut bacteria can.
subheadline: IBS, chronic bloating, abdominal pain, and unpredictable bowel habits aren't "just stress." They're signs of a digestive tract that's been damaged by years of antibiotics, processed food, restrictive diets, or chronic stress. Piedmont Nutrition Care identifies which gut imbalances are driving your symptoms and uses targeted food chemistry to restore digestive function — without another round of steroids or a lifetime of avoidance.
agitation: Everything you eat makes your stomach blow up like a balloon. You mentally map public restrooms before leaving the house. You've tried digestive enzymes, fiber supplements, probiotics, apple cider vinegar, aloe vera, glutamine — the entire supplement aisle — with no lasting improvement.

Your anxiety makes your IBS worse, and your IBS makes your anxiety worse. It's a cycle that makes normal life — dinner with friends, travel, even a routine workday — feel impossible. And the last doctor you saw told you to "reduce stress" as if that were something you hadn't already considered.
howItWorks: Jeanne evaluates your digestive function, identifies which bacterial populations are over- or under-represented in your gut, and determines which foods are triggering your inflammatory response versus supporting gut repair. The protocol isn't about avoidance — it's about rebuilding.
You'll learn which specific foods feed the beneficial bacteria your gut needs to function, and which seemingly "healthy" foods may be aggravating your specific condition.

testimonial.quote: After months of intense IBS symptoms, I met with Jeanne to help figure out which foods to avoid and which foods to eat so that I wouldn't have to continue taking steroids and antibiotics. After following her recommendations, I am feeling so much better. I'm living and eating with far less abdominal pain and digestive issues.
testimonial.author: M. Cooper

ctaLabel: Book Your IBS & Gut Health Assessment
ctaTriggers: No more guessing which foods are safe
subheadlineShort: IBS and chronic digestive issues aren't "just stress." Piedmont Nutrition Care identifies the gut bacteria imbalances driving your symptoms and rebuilds your digestive function.
agitationShort: Your stomach bloats painfully after meals, no matter how carefully you eat. You've tried elimination diets and probiotics — nothing sticks.
You've started avoiding restaurants, skipping meals, and planning your life around your symptoms. Food has become a source of anxiety.
howItWorksShort: Jeanne evaluates your digestive function, identifies which bacterial populations are disrupted, and determines which foods trigger inflammation versus support gut repair.
The protocol rebuilds your gut ecosystem. You'll learn which foods feed beneficial bacteria and which aggravate your specific condition.
